_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: In mice lacking SCF in Schwann cells (Scf flox/gfp; DhhCre), we did not observe any hair color changes for up to 6 mo
details: No hair color changes observed for up to 6 months when used to delete Scf in Schwann cells
